Interface IRect

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster

ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a rectangle.

[Guid("A10A39E8-B9CA-11D2-8E30-00A0249480F0")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IRect

Properties

XMax

Maximum X value of the rectangle.

double XMax { get; set; }
